title: MANGA Which one
wikitext:
[]: Which one?             Quote Post by Merlin Ocelot » Thu Jan 03, 2008 8:37 pm Ok guys... I'm confused. I want to buy the Eva Manga but what I understand there's more than one serie. I mean from the original story (not Angelic Days or some spin-off alter univserse thing) and stuff... when I look on amazon I see that there is, for example, a Volume 2. released in 1998 and a volume 2. released in 2004. Can someone explain this to me? Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jan 03, 2008 11:31 pm I'm not sure what you're referring to, but there were 2 editions. And AFAIK, the only difference is one's printed on larger paper and is flipped. I think the newer edition was the one that isn't flipped so it reads like regular manga.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Fri Jan 04, 2008 12:25 am The first edition is the special collectors edition, which they printed up until Volume 7. 2nd edition was started at Volume 8 (2004) and now covers all volumes 1-10 (currently). 1st edition is a bit bigger and wider than the 2nd, which is more standardized. The 1st edition is no longer being sold directly and have turned into collectors items more or less, so in essence you will want to go with the 2004 version (2nd edition).

[]:             Quote Post by Merlin Ocelot » Fri Jan 04, 2008 9:57 am Ok! Thanks guys!

[]: Japanese Manga Volumes [1-11] Question             Quote Post by Malichinari » Thu Jun 17, 2010 8:55 pm Rather than create an entirely new thread for one question, I figured this would be a good place to ask. http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/detailview.html?KEY=NEOTOR-272&ref=myp Does anyone know if this is one massive book or if it is the first 11 volumes just being shipped together in a boxed set style? The product description says 1 book/unit, but it seems kind of odd to bind the first 11 together and then have 12 tagging along by its lonesome. Any information would be much appreciated.

[]: Re: Japanese Manga Volumes [1-11] Question             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jun 17, 2010 10:08 pm Malichinari wrote: Does anyone know if this is one massive book or if it is the first 11 volumes just being shipped together in a boxed set style?

[]:             Quote Post by Malichinari » Fri Jun 18, 2010 10:25 am Good to know. Thanks.
